## What does this PR do?

Describe the change in 1-3 sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Occupation track
- [ ] Workflow mode
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Script
- [ ] Cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include private personal data.
- [ ] I did not add fake career claims, metrics, or testimonials.
- [ ] Examples are clearly marked as examples.
- [ ] Scripts run without paid API keys.
- [ ] README or docs were updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run doctor`.
